::: {.gallery}

![](img/20250815_051254.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_060038.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_060046.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_070613.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_073416.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_073459.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_073826.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_084812.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_085639.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_085737.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_090621.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20260327_105121.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_094636.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_094702.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_094924.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_095020.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_100851.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_100932.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_100955.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_122451.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_122524.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_122749.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_125946.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_133200.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_135918.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_143419.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_145435.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_145453.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_145508.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_145617.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_151536.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_152849.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_162834.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_164246.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_165648.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_171732.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_171747.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_175342.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_181519.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_182022.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_193100.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_193905.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_194204.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_200635.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20250815_201818.webp){group="tour"}

:::
